description: Read-only NEAR Intents / Defuse tool for token resolution, protocol metadata, balance queries, and dry swap quotes. No authentication required.

query.description: Token reference to resolve. Examples: 'ethereum', 'USDC on arbitrum', 'wrapped near', 'bitcoin'.

list_all.description: Return all known Defuse tokens instead of resolving a specific query.

asset_id.description: Defuse asset ID to look up, for example 'nep141:wrap.near'.

account_id.description: NEAR account ID or 0x-prefixed wallet address used for balance and quote queries.

token_ids.description: Specific Defuse asset IDs to query. If omitted, all known tokens are requested and zero balances are filtered out.

from_token.description: Source token symbol or Defuse asset ID for a dry quote.

to_token.description: Destination token symbol or Defuse asset ID for a dry quote.

amount.description: Human-readable amount to quote, for example '100.5'.

slippage_bps.description: Slippage tolerance in basis points. Defaults to 100 (1%).

swap_type.description: Swap type for the dry quote. Supported values: EXACT_INPUT or EXACT_OUTPUT.
